title: GenomeLens 共线性图 (Synteny Figure)
description: 用于绘制基因级或区段级双物种共线性图，突出展示成对保守基因、顺序变化和局部结构差异。它比点图更强调具体基因与片段之间的对应关系，适合论文正文或补充图展示。
description_en: Draws gene-level or region-level synteny figures for two species, highlighting conserved gene pairs, order changes, and local structural differences. Compared with a dotplot, it emphasizes explicit gene and segment correspondence and is well suited for main-text or supplementary figures.
context: 双物种基因级共线性关系与局部结构展示。
context_en: Gene-level syntenic relationships and local structural display for two species.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含两物种注释与序列文件的目录，用于构建基因轨道、顺序与物种背景。
params.description_en: Directory containing the annotation and sequence files for both species, used to build gene tracks, ordering, and species context.

params.label: Blocks 文件
params.description: 双物种共线性区块文件，决定图中哪些片段与基因需要建立对应关系并参与连线。
params.description_en: Pairwise synteny blocks file defining which segments and genes should be connected in the figure.

params.label: Layout 文件
params.description: 可选布局文件，用于手动指定轨道顺序、方向或版式；不提供时使用默认布局。
params.description_en: Optional layout file for manually specifying track order, orientation, or panel arrangement; the default layout is used when omitted.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 画布尺寸，例如 10x5；留空使用默认。
params.description_en: Figure size, e.g. 10x5; leave empty for default.
